_comment: Calibrated GDD thresholds for Almaty (base 5C). Real Open-Meteo archive data shows ~1622 GDD accumulated from Apr 1 by mid-July — far above the generic-literature defaults (wormwood end 950), which would wrongly zero every species in July. These values are calibrated against Almaty's climate and local phenology (birch: spring; wormwood: late Jul–Aug peak; ragweed: Aug–Sep peak). Still // CALIBRATE: verify with team lead before finals.
